hooks.command:
python -c "import json, subprocess, sys, pathlib; data=json.load(sys.stdin); tool=data.get('tool_name',''); inp=data.get('tool_input',{}); paths=[]; \
for key in ('file_path','path'): \
    v=inp.get(key); \
    paths.extend(v if isinstance(v,list) else ([v] if isinstance(v,str) else [])); \
edits=inp.get('edits',[]); \
for e in edits: \
    p=e.get('file_path') or e.get('path'); \
    paths.extend([p] if isinstance(p,str) else []); \
files=[str(pathlib.Path(p)) for p in dict.fromkeys(paths) if isinstance(p,str) and p.endswith('.py') and pathlib.Path(p).exists()]; \
subprocess.run(['ruff','format',*files], check=False) if files else None; \
subprocess.run(['ruff','check','--fix',*files], check=False) if files else None"
